commands.review_summary:
The PR demotes the installed global source-only TypeScript plugin runtime diagnostic from error to warning, lets discovery load the TypeScript source fallback, updates the discovery regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main errors and returns `null` for an already-installed global TypeScript package entry without built output, and the existing discovery test codifies that rejection. I did not execute tests because this review was required to be read-only.
